_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json

Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Mahagun Mezzaria
project.address: Plot No. GH-01/A, Sector 78, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201304
project.tagline: The Pinnacle of Ultra-Luxury Living in Central Noida
project.description: Mahagun Mezzaria is an iconic ultra-luxury ready-to-move development featuring G+34 skyscrapers, India's first hanging infinity pool, and majestic 22-foot high living ceilings.
project.long_description: Mahagun Mezzaria stands as the ultimate crown jewel of ultra-luxury real estate in Central Noida, Sector 78. Artfully designed by the world-renowned architect Hafeez Contractor, this majestic Art Deco landmark is spread over 10 beautifully landscaped acres. Offering extreme low-density vertical estates (only 718 units in 8 towers rising G+34 floors), the project serves only 2 apartments per floor via private lift lobbies opening directly into living suites. The signature layouts highlight palatial double-height living areas with remarkable 22-foot high ceilings and VRF air-conditioning pre-ducted throughout. Structurally certified with advanced seismic-resistant RCC frames, the project features state-of-the-art luxuries, including India's first hanging infinity pool, an outdoor hot-water pool with sundeck, a massive 30,000 sq ft clubhouse, and 100% active, clear registries.
project.design_theme: Modern Art Deco Skyscraper Palaces with Majestic Ceilings
marketing_claims: India's First Hanging Infinity Pool and Hot Water Deck
Majestic Double-Height Living Areas with 22-foot High Ceilings
Only 2 Ultra-Luxury Residences Per Floor for Maximum Privacy
Private Lifts Opening Directly into Luxury Family Suites
100% Fully Commissioned and Operational 30,000 Sq Ft Club Mezz
Fully Approved and Active Flat Registries with Zero Dues Blocks
ai_search_keywords: double height living room flats Noida
ready to move luxury apartments Noida
project.project_risk_flag: None: Flawless legal standing, CC/OC received, and active flat registries.

builder.name: Mahagun Group
builder.company_overview: Mahagun Group is a multi-billion real estate conglomerate operating in residential, commercial, and hospitality sectors across Delhi-NCR. Synonymous with timely delivery and transparency, the group has delivered over 15.76 million sq ft of landmark structures, housing over 11,500 happy families. With massive township-format portfolios under construction, they are highly regarded as one of Noida's most reliable and financially stable development houses.
awards: Best Premium Housing Project of the Year 2021
Most Trusted Brand in Real Estate (NCR) - Times Realty 2023

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Mahagun Mezzaria is the premier ultra-luxury residential skyscraper in Central Noida, Sector 78, distinguished by double-height 22ft living areas and complete legal/title clarity.
why_buy: Majestic Ceiling Layouts: Double-height 22-foot high living ceilings create an unmatched vertical estate scale.
India's First Hanging Infinity Pool: Offers an elite lifestyle with sundecks and outdoor hot water zones.
Extreme Low Density: Houses just 718 homes over 10 acres, serving only 2 residences per floor via private lift lobbies.
100% Secure Title: Active flat registries, CC/OC received, and zero Noida Authority dues blocks.
why_avoid: Colossal Monthly Upkeep: VRF air conditioning and hanging infinity pools command extremely high maintenance fees.
Very High Entry Tickets: Minimum entry ticket starts at ₹4.02 Cr, completely shutting out mid-market buyers.
decision_profile.best_for: Ultra-HNIs, corporate board directors, wealthy NRIs, and luxury connoisseurs demanding pristine vertical estates.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Buyers with budgets under ₹4 Crore, yield-first cash-flow investors, or speculative flippers.

investment_insights.market_desc: High demand for completed, registry-cleared luxury skyscrapers in Central Noida.

persona_descriptions.NRI: Elite NRI buyers seeking a ready vertical palace in Noida with a premium developer, direct metro links, and zero legal stress.
persona_descriptions.UPGRADER: Ultra-high-income upgraders looking to consolidate separate flats into a single vertical palace.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Conservative — avoids any under-construction or registry-distressed assets
persona_profile.family_stage: Established nuclear families prioritizing high security and low density
persona_profile.work_location: Noida corporate IT corridors or central Delhi hub
persona_profile.motivation_note: A true landmark luxury address in central Noida with premium specifications and zero risk.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Mahagun Mezzaria is the premier ultra-luxury residential skyscraper in Sector 78. Its architectural design, 22-foot high living areas, and clean legal titles make it the ultimate luxury safe haven in central Noida.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Outstanding for elite buyers prioritizing space and grandeur. The private lobbies, high security, and low density make it extremely secure.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: An exceptional capital preserver. Resale value is protected by its unique, premium architectural hallmarks.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Exceptional children play courts, outdoor hot water pool with deck, and highly reputed schools inside a 2km radius.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Recommended for wealth-preservation and steady rental yield from multinational executives.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: The pinnacle of luxury in Sector 78. Hafeez Contractor design, Italian marble, and India's first hanging pool set it apart.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Lowest risk luxury asset. Completely ready, active registries, and robust Joint Venture ledger accounts.
walk_away_conditions: Strict preference for low maintenance budgets.
negotiation_leverage: Use massive ready units in Sector 75/78 to negotiate hard on specific tower rise PLCs.
Pit multiple resale HNI sellers against each other.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Ready to move immediately. Act now if a registered double-height unit is available below ₹16,500/sqft.
recommendation_profile.admin_notes: Very strong joint venture structure with active tripartite clearances.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Larger project area (10 acres vs 1.27 acres), lower unit density, and 22-foot living ceilings.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Burj Noida offers modern smart-home facilities and a newer construction timeline.
competitors.verdict: Mahagun Mezzaria wins on room sizing, lower density, and double-height ceiling scale; Burj Noida wins on smart-home features and brand-new construction.
competitors.price_delta_note: Mezzaria is roughly priced at par (~₹16,500/sqft) with comparable luxury standard.
